case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA LIDIA REYES ARGUETA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARGUETA, MARIA LIDIA REYES $1,990.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
